name: Boulevard Salon & Spa Management API
what_it_does: Boulevard REST API for premium salon, spa, and wellness booking and management platform. Enables AI agents to manage appointment booking and staff scheduling, handle client profiles and service history, process retail and service point-of-sale transactions, manage membership and subscription billing, access waitlist and online booking data, retrieve business analytics and revenue reporting, handle gift card programs, and integrate salon data with marketing platforms and digital booking channels.
use_cases: Managing appointment booking and staff scheduling from salon operations agents
Processing membership billing and renewal from subscription management agents
Accessing client service history and preferences from personalization agents
Integrating booking data with marketing platforms from client engagement agents
not_for: Medical aesthetic procedures requiring clinical EMR without spa scheduling
Large enterprise gym chains without beauty service focus
Non-appointment-based retail without service scheduling workflows
best_when: A premium salon, day spa, medspa, or wellness studio using Boulevard wants AI agents to automate appointment management, membership billing, client communication, and business analytics.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Client service history and personal preferences are sensitive. Medical spa treatment records may constitute PHI under HIPAA. Membership payment data requires PCI-DSS compliance.

auth.notes: Boulevard uses API key and OAuth 2.0 for API access. Business-level credentials with appointment, client, and billing scopes. Developer portal with documentation. Webhooks for real-time appointment and transaction events. Partner program for technology integrations.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — premium salon software subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Monthly per-location pricing; premium positioning for upscale salons
pricing.notes: Los Angeles, California. Founded 2016. VC-backed premium salon and spa platform. Focus on upscale and luxury segment. Medspa expansion. Raised $70M+ Series C. Competes with Vagaro and Mindbody for salon/spa management. Strong online booking and client experience focus.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Client service history and personal preferences are sensitive
No public MCP server — OAuth2 REST API with developer portal
Medspa clinical treatment records may be PHI — verify HIPAA applicability
Membership billing automation must handle subscription lifecycle and cancellations carefully
Online booking automation must respect staff availability rules and service duration buffers
Client no-show and cancellation automation must comply with stated cancellation policies
agent_readiness.security_notes: Client PII and service data. PCI-DSS, SOC2. OAuth2 + API key. US data residency. Medspa records may require HIPAA compliance.

security_score_components.security_notes: Client PII and service data. PCI-DSS, SOC2. OAuth2. US data residency. Medical spa records may be PHI.
